turns.content:
You are hm-integration-checker. Read /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.hivemind/planning/phase-57-58-loop-2026-06-03/UAT-task-spec.md for the FULL UAT mission.

EXECUTE the REAL-LIFE UAT of Phase 58:

1. WRITE executable bash script at /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.hivemind/planning/phase-57-58-loop-2026-06-03/UAT-PHASE-58.sh that exercises G1-G6 in real tmux sessions
2. EXECUTE the script via bash tool — real tmux daemon, real assertions, no mocks
3. WRITE UAT report at /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.hivemind/planning/phase-57-58-loop-2026-06-03/UAT-PHASE-58-REPORT.md with detailed per-scenario results
4. ATOMIC COMMIT: phase-58: UAT — UAT-PHASE-58.sh + REPORT + log

Available tools:
- tmux-copilot (send-keys, forward-prompt, take-over, release, list-panes, compute-grid, respawn)
- delegation-status (list, status, find-stackable, pool)
- session-tracker (query session state, events)
- hivemind-session-view (cross-session tree)
- bash (tmux CLI, file ops, npm commands)

DO NOT modify src/ or tests/ (UAT is non-invasive).
DO NOT touch .hivemind/ runtime state beyond what the system writes.
USE real tmux daemon — verify with `tmux -V` first.

Return: script path + LOC + report path + LOC + commit SHA + per-scenario PASS/FAIL + overall X/6 + gate triad verdict.
Real-life UAT of Phase 58 — 6 features in real tmux
